name: spoonlauncher-aios-core
description: AIOS Core - AI Operating System with 12 specialized agents for full software development lifecycle. Agents cover development, architecture, QA, DevOps, product management, UX design, data engineering, and more.

plugins.name: aios-core
plugins.description: AI Operating System with 12 specialized agents (dev, architect, qa, devops, pm, po, sm, analyst, ux, data, squad, orchestrate) plus diagnostics and onboarding utilities. Each agent has distinct expertise, authority boundaries, and collaboration protocols.
